info.name: NASA Astronomy Picture of the Day (APOD) API
Get Astronomy Picture of the Day

params.name: date
params.description: The date of the APOD image to retrieve (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to today.

params.name: start_date
params.description: Start of a date range (YYYY-MM-DD). Cannot be used with date.

params.name: end_date
params.description: End of a date range (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to today.

params.name: count
params.description: Return count randomly chosen images. Cannot be used with date or date range.

params.name: thumbs
params.description: Return the URL of a video thumbnail when the media type is video.

items.docs: Get Astronomy Picture of the Day
